notes: Claude's initial implementation filtered only the specific TASK-007 witness records that had been stored, which could undercount tie-free samples.
Codex changed TASK-008 to recompute tie-free LOO and replace-one maxima for every separating sample from TASK-007.
Under the accepted recomputation-based criterion, all 2068 TASK-007 separating samples remain tie-free witnesses.
Final accepted state writes outputs/witnesses/1nn_tie_free_witnesses.json and passes 162 tests.
